landing.page_title: AuctionBall — Run your tournament auction in minutes

hero.body: AuctionBall is a hosted platform for tournament organizers — cricket, football and beyond. Sign up, pick a subdomain, add your players and teams, and run a fully real-time auction — control center, big-screen display, team-device bidding — without installing anything.

steps.heading: Three steps from sign-up to sold.
steps.body: No installs, no servers, no API keys. Create your organization and you are minutes away from a working live auction on your own subdomain.
steps.s1_body_a: Pick an org name and a subdomain. Your dashboard is live at
steps.s1_body_b: in 30 seconds — Free tier, no card.
steps.s2_body: Create a season, set the per-team purse, then bulk-import players via CSV or add them one at a time. Invite team owners by email — each gets a private bidding link.
steps.s3_body_a: Open the control panel on your tablet, project
steps.s3_body_b: on the venue display, send captains their team device URL. Bids fly in real time.

features.body: One hosted platform. Control panel, big-screen, team-device, multi-season, billing — all in your browser, all on every plan including Free.
features.engine_body: Every action — start, pause, bid, sold, unsold — pushes through a private WebSocket channel scoped to your organization. The control panel, big screen and every team device stay perfectly in sync, with no polling and no perceptible lag.
features.bigscreen_body_b: . 4K-ready, animated sold popups, team budget ticker.
features.multi_body: Run BPL 2025 and BPL 2026 from the same organization. Each season has its own teams, purse, players and audit log — switch between them with one dropdown.
features.profiles_body: Players carry a photo, category (Elite / Regular / New), base price, jersey number, batting and bowling style. Teams map to user accounts so each captain logs in and sees only their squad and remaining purse.
features.control_body: Tablet-friendly panel with Start, Pause, Sold, Unsold and Reset — plus keyboard shortcuts (Space, S, U, R) for fast auctioneers. Full timestamped audit log of every bid, override and reset.
features.mobile_body: Each team gets a unique bidding link, regenerable per season. Captains open it on any phone — works at 360px+, no app needed. BID NOW button, real-time budget tracking, instant disable when funds run out.

bigscreen_section.heading: This is your venue display.
bigscreen_section.body_b: on the projector or 4K TV. Real-time updates via WebSocket — no refresh, no lag.

pricing.heading: Simple, BDT-priced plans.
pricing.body_a: Start free, upgrade when you outgrow it. Monthly billing, cancel any time. Need an Enterprise plan with white-label and SSO?
pricing.free_tagline: Try the full auction flow with a small tournament. No credit card needed.
pricing.starter_tagline: For organizers running club tournaments and corporate cricket cups.
pricing.starter_b3: Up to 100 players, {teams} teams per season
pricing.pro_tagline: For agencies and federations running mid-sized tournaments.
pricing.pro_b5: Logo on big-screen and team device
pricing.enterprise_tagline: For large federations and franchise leagues with no upper bound.

why.body: You should be focused on cricket, sponsors, and the big screen — not on servers, security patches, or SSL certificates. Let us handle that part.
why.i1_body: Sign up, get your subdomain, run an auction in 5 minutes. We handle hosting, scaling, backups, SSL — you focus on the tournament.
why.i2_body: WebSocket channels keep the control panel, big-screen and every team device in millisecond sync. No 2-second lag, no thundering herd on the database.
why.i3_body: Every player, team, bid and season is scoped to your organization. Other organizers cannot see your data — period. Your tournament is your tournament.
why.i4_body: BDT pricing. bKash, Nagad, Rocket and SSLCommerz checkout. Bengali UI alongside English. Asia/Dhaka timezone by default.

testimonials.t1_quote: We ran our 12-team corporate cricket cup on AuctionBall — control panel on the iPad, big screen via projector, captains bidding from their phones. Setup took ten minutes, not ten hours.
testimonials.t2_quote: The big-screen view sold us. Plug a laptop into the projector, open the live URL, instant venue display. Captains opened their team link on their phones and we went live in minutes.
testimonials.t3_quote: Multi-season was the killer feature. We run six tournaments a year and now they are all on one dashboard with full audit logs and CSV export. No more spreadsheets, no more lost data.

faq.heading: Questions, answered.
faq.q1: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a1: No. AuctionBall is fully hosted. Sign up at {domain}, pick a subdomain like myclub.{domain}, and you are ready to run an auction from any browser. We handle servers, backups, SSL and updates.
faq.a2: Each team gets a unique bidding link, regenerable per season. Captains open it on any phone (works at 360px+) and see a mobile-optimized panel: current player, current bid, remaining budget, and a single BID NOW button. Real-time updates via WebSocket — no app to install.
faq.q3: Is my data isolated from other organizations?
faq.a3: Yes. AuctionBall is multi-tenant by design. Every database row carries an org_id and queries are scoped server-side. No other organization can see your players, teams, bids or audit log. You can also export everything as CSV at any time.
faq.q4: Can I run multiple tournaments at once?
faq.a4: Free is limited to 1 active season. Starter allows 3 seasons (concurrent or archived). Pro removes the limit entirely — run as many tournaments in parallel as you need. Each season has fully isolated teams, purse, players and audit log.
faq.q5: What happens to my auction during a network drop?
faq.a5: The auction state lives in our database, not in browser memory, and the timer is server-authoritative. If the auctioneer or a captain loses connection, they reconnect automatically and resume exactly where they left off — bids in flight are not lost.
faq.a6: CSV export of teams, players, sold prices, bid history and unsold list ships with Starter and above. PDF export and custom org branding ship with Pro. Your data is yours — export it any time, no lock-in.

payments.heading: Pay the way Bangladesh pays.
payments.footer: Monthly billing · cancel any time · invoices on every plan

cta.free_pill: Free tier · no credit card · live in 5 minutes
cta.body: Create your organization, claim a subdomain, run a full auction on the Free tier. Upgrade when you outgrow it — your data, your players, your seasons all carry over.

footer.about: A hosted platform for live cricket player auctions. Built in Dhaka for tournament organizers everywhere.

auth.welcome_back_subtitle: Log in to your AuctionBall organization.
auth.create_org_subtitle: Pick a subdomain, add an admin, choose a plan. 30 seconds and you are running auctions.
auth.terms_agreement: By signing up you agree to our {terms} and {privacy}.
auth.forgot_subtitle: No worries — type your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.reset_subtitle: Pick a strong one — at least 8 characters.
auth.verify_subtitle: We sent a verification link to your inbox. Click it to activate your account.
auth.verify_link_sent: A new verification email has been sent.
auth.confirm_subtitle: This is a secure area. Please enter your password again to continue.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.no_active_season_body: Create your first season to start adding players and teams. Setting a season as active unlocks the auction control center.

auction.pick_player_prompt: Pick a player from the queue
auction.click_player_hint: Click a player on the left to load them into the live slot.
auction.click_team_hint: Click a team → tap an increment to place a bid as that team.

team_device.waiting_for_player: Waiting for the auctioneer to load a player…
team_device.leading_message: You hold the leading bid — wait for the next bid to act again.
team_device.not_running_message: Bidding opens when the auctioneer starts the timer.
team_device.not_assigned_body: You're a {role} of {org} but no team is bound to your account in the current season. Ask an org admin to assign you as a team owner before you can place bids.
team_device.not_assigned_old_team: Your old team is not part of the currently active season.

settings.organization_blurb: Update name, subdomain and timezone. Save action lands in the next pass.
settings.currency_blurb: All money is stored in BDT. This setting only changes how amounts appear in the dashboard, big screen, exports and emails. Switch to USD if you're running a federation outside Bangladesh.
settings.custom_domain_blurb: Run AuctionBall on your own host like bpl-cup.example.com. Your big-screen and team-device pages serve from your domain — and the AuctionBall watermark disappears entirely.
settings.upgrade_for_domain: Custom domains are a Pro / Enterprise feature.
settings.dns_step1: Step 1 — Add this TXT record at your DNS provider to prove ownership:
settings.dns_step2: Step 2 — Point your domain at AuctionBall:
settings.confirm_remove_domain: Remove the custom domain? Your big-screen will fall back to the default subdomain.
settings.danger_blurb: Deleting the organization removes all seasons, players, teams and bids. Cannot be undone.

billing.confirm_cancel: Cancel auto-renew? You'll keep your current plan access until the billing period ends.
billing.providers_help: Set PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID/SECRET or BKASH_USERNAME/PASSWORD/APP_KEY/APP_SECRET in .env to enable real payments. Without keys, the dev simulator marks payments instantly successful.
billing.title: Billing
billing.bkash_awaiting_body: We received your payment for the {plan} plan (৳{amount}, TrxID {trx}). Submitted {when}. Your account will be activated within {hours} hours after we verify the transaction.
billing.modal_trx_hint: Found on the bKash confirmation SMS — usually 10 characters.
billing.modal_sender_hint: The bKash number you sent the money from. We cross-check it against our receipt.
billing.modal_after_submit_note: After you submit, your account will be activated within {hours} hours once we verify the payment.

public_register.intro_player: Fill in your details. The organizer will review your registration before the auction starts.
public_register.intro_team: Fill in your team details. The organizer will review your registration before the auction starts.
public_register.trx_id_help: Paste the TrxID from your bKash SMS, or your bank deposit reference. We verify before approving the registration.

profile.heading: Profile
profile.info_subtitle: Update your account's profile information and email address.
profile.name: Name
profile.resend_verification: Click here to re-send the verification email.
profile.verification_link_sent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
profile.password_subtitle: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.
profile.delete_subtitle: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Before deleting your account, please download any data or information that you wish to retain.
profile.delete_confirm_title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
profile.delete_confirm_body: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

invite.subtitle: You've been invited as {role}
invite.already_have_account: You already have an AuctionBall account with this email — clicking accept will add this organization to your account.

auction_page.control_pick_heading: Pick a player from the queue
auction_page.control_pick_body: Click any queued player on the left to set them as the current player.
auction_page.control_empty_body: Click a player on the left to load them into the live slot.
auction_page.control_confirm_reset_body: All bids on the current player will be cleared and the player will be returned to the queue. This is intended for re-running a lot from scratch.
auction_page.bigscreen_waiting_body: The auctioneer hasn't selected a player yet.
auction_page.no_teams_body: Once teams exist and players are sold, their cards will appear here in real time.

teams_page.title: Teams
teams_page.section_team_reg_subtitle: Share a public URL where team owners can self-register. You review + approve them on this page.
teams_page.registration_instructions_placeholder: bKash 01XXX-XXXXXXX. Send Money. Note your team name in the reference.
teams_page.no_teams_body: Add at least 2 teams before starting an auction.
teams_page.confirm_delete_body: All players bought by this team will be released back to the queue, and the team's budget is wiped. This cannot be undone.
teams_page.confirm_reject_body: Their record will be deleted (logo too). They'll need to re-register if you change your mind.
teams_page.regenerate_link_title: Generate a new team registration link?
teams_page.regenerate_link_body: The current public URL will stop working immediately. Anyone who has already submitted is unaffected.
teams_page.copied_body: Team registration link copied to clipboard.

players_import.title: Import players
players_import.errors_heading: {count} rows have errors and will be skipped

players_page.title: Players
players_page.at_limit_prefix: You've reached your plan's player limit.
players_page.empty_state: No players. Click {add} to create your roster.
players_page.confirm_delete_body: This permanently removes the player from the season. If they were sold, the team's budget is restored.
players_page.confirm_reject_body: Their record will be deleted. They'll need to re-register if you change your mind later.
players_page.confirm_approve_all_body: Each will be moved into the auction queue and become eligible for bidding.

analytics_page.title: Analytics
analytics_page.gate_heading: Analytics is on the Pro plan.
analytics_page.gate_body: Charts, trend lines, and exports unlock on Pro. Your {plan} plan still tracks all the data — upgrade any time and history is preserved.
analytics_page.no_spending: No spending yet — start the auction.
analytics_page.no_bids_yet: No bids yet — start an auction to populate the timeline.

help_page.still_stuck: Still stuck? {link} — we usually reply within a few hours.
help_page.loading_body: If this stays empty, no markdown files are present in resources/docs/{en,bn}.
help_page.seo_desc_default: Step-by-step guides for setting up tournaments, running live auctions, and managing teams on AuctionBall.

super_admin.title: Super admin
super_admin.force_renew_body: Subscription #{id} ({plan} via {provider}). Billing will be attempted now instead of waiting for the cron.
super_admin.impersonate_body: You'll be signed in as one of their org admins for support. Use the orange "Stop" banner at the top to return to your super-admin session.
super_admin.promote_body: They will gain full platform access — every org, every payment, every audit log. Only enable for trusted operators.
super_admin.demote_body: They will lose access to /admin and all platform-management tools.
super_admin.cant_change_own: You can't change your own super-admin flag.
super_admin.reset_pw_body: A new random password will be generated and shown once on the next screen.
super_admin.delete_user_body: Their user record will be wiped permanently. Any orgs they were the sole admin of will be left orphaned.
super_admin.orgs_delete_body: This permanently removes the organization, its users, seasons, players, teams, bids, and audit history. This cannot be undone.
super_admin.payments_approve_body: Their plan will switch to {plan} immediately. The customer gets a notification email confirming activation. TrxID: {trx}.
super_admin.payments_reject_body: TrxID {trx} (৳{amount}) will be marked failed and the customer will be notified by email. They can resubmit later.
super_admin.payments_reject_reason_placeholder: e.g. TrxID not found in our bKash records
super_admin.platform_logo_help: Shows in landing header, dashboard sidebar, login pages, and emails. PNG / JPG / WEBP up to 2 MB. (SVG disabled for security.)
super_admin.remove_logo_body: The default gradient mark will show in headers and emails until you upload a new one.
super_admin.label_domain_help: Hostname only (no http:// or path). Reflects everywhere — landing, register, dashboard, PDF footers, FAQ.
super_admin.landing_payments_help: Tick the methods you're actually ready to accept. Unchecked methods stay hidden from the public landing page. If you uncheck everything, the entire section disappears.
super_admin.plans_subtitle: Edit per-plan limits, prices, and feature flags. Changes apply immediately to all orgs (existing data is preserved).
super_admin.subs_cancel_body: The org will keep their current plan until the period ends, then automatically move to Free. They can re-subscribe any time.
super_admin.audit_no_match: No audit events match the filters.
super_admin.subs_search_placeholder: Search by org name or slug…
super_admin.plans_intro: Edit price and per-plan limits. Changes apply immediately to all organizations on each plan. Set any limit to {inf} for unlimited.
super_admin.reset_pw_body_long: A new temporary password will be generated and shown to you once. Share it securely with the user.
super_admin.delete_user_body_long:
{email}

This removes their account and all org memberships. If they are the sole admin of an organization, that org will lose all admin access. Type DELETE below to confirm.
super_admin.no_org_body: {name} isn't a member of any organization yet — there's nothing to grant a subscription to. Attach them to an org first (via "Create user" with an existing-org attach, or from the org's Users page).
super_admin.mark_super_admin_help: Full platform access — only enable for trusted admins.
super_admin.paid_plan_note: A manual subscription is created — no payment row, auto-renew is off, expires after {months} month(s).
super_admin.no_org_note: No organization will be attached. Useful for super-admin-only logins or quick test accounts.
super_admin.grant_body: Manually mark {name}'s organization as active until the chosen date. Auto-renew stays off — useful for free trial / test / comp access.
super_admin.grant_note_placeholder: e.g. Free trial granted by support
super_admin.change_plan_body: Current plan: {current} → New plan: {next}. Limits apply immediately. This is logged in the audit trail.
super_admin.permanently_delete_body: This deletes ALL of their seasons, players, teams, bids, payments and audit log. Cannot be undone. To prevent accidents, type the org's slug below.
super_admin.extend_body: Manually mark {name} as active until the chosen date. Auto-renew stays off — useful for free trial / test / comp access.
super_admin.extend_plan_help: Picking a different plan also updates the org's plan column.
super_admin.extend_note_placeholder: e.g. Test access for evaluation, expires 30 days

seasons_page.title: Seasons
seasons_page.at_limit_prefix: You've reached your plan's season limit.
seasons_page.bid_step_bdt_hint: Each new bid in BDT mode must beat the current bid by this many ৳. Used as-is — no conversion.
seasons_page.bid_step_usd_hint: Each new bid in USD mode must beat the current bid by this many $. Independent of BDT step — no conversion.
seasons_page.edit_section_subtitle: Update the season's name, year, sport, budget and dates.
seasons_page.public_reg_subtitle: Share a public URL where players can self-register. You review and approve them in the Players page.
seasons_page.registration_instructions_placeholder: bKash 01XXX-XXXXXXX. Note your name in the reference.
seasons_page.form_builder_subtitle: Add custom fields to collect any info you want from registering players. Drag to reorder. These appear below the built-in fields on the public registration page.
seasons_page.default_fields_help: These fields are already included at the top of the public player registration form. Custom fields you add below will appear after these.
seasons_page.default_preview_image: Image upload and crop area appears here.
seasons_page.default_payment_note: If registration fee is enabled, players also see payment instructions and submit their transaction/reference ID.
seasons_page.payment_methods_label: PAYMENT METHODS — players see all of these on the form
seasons_page.payment_methods_help: Players see all configured methods on the form, then enter their bKash TrxID or bank reference in a single text input below the cards.
seasons_page.no_fields_body: Click any field type below to add. Built-in fields (name, category, position, photo) are always included.
seasons_page.categories_subtitle: Define the categories players are sorted into for this season, and the default base price each one gets on public registration. Renaming or removing a category will leave existing players with that category uncategorised — you'll need to re-assign them.
seasons_page.no_categories_body: Add at least one — the player form needs something to pick from.
seasons_page.image_size_help: Uploaded image is cropped to this square size before save. Recommended 600×600.
seasons_page.no_seasons_body: Create your first season to add players and run an auction.
seasons_page.confirm_at_least_one_category: At least one category is required.
seasons_page.confirm_activate_body: The currently active season (if any) will be deactivated. Players, teams, and the auction will switch to this season.
seasons_page.confirm_deactivate_body: The season is kept (with all its players, teams, and bid history) but the dashboard will show no active season — live auction, big screen, and bidding pages will show "No active season" until you activate one.
seasons_page.confirm_delete_cascade: Will permanently delete {parts} and all auction state for this season. This cannot be undone.
seasons_page.confirm_delete_simple: Will permanently delete this season. This cannot be undone.
seasons_page.regenerate_link_body: The current public registration URL will stop working immediately. Anyone who has already submitted is unaffected — only future visitors with the old link will see a 404.
seasons_page.bid_step_bdt_body: Each new bid must exceed the current by at least this many ৳.
seasons_page.bid_step_usd_body: Each new bid must exceed the current by at least this many $.
seasons_page.need_other_field_body: Conditions depend on the value of another field. Add at least one other field, then come back and turn on the conditional rule.

public_blog.seo_title: AuctionBall Blog | Auction Tips, Tournament Guides & Product Updates
public_blog.seo_description: Read AuctionBall guides, tournament auction tips, product updates, and practical playbooks for running cricket, football, and live player auctions.
public_blog.heading: AuctionBall Blog
public_blog.subtitle: Guides, product updates, and practical auction playbooks for organizers running cricket, football, and live player auctions.
public_blog.empty_body: New auction guides will appear here after they are published.
public_blog.help_body: Use the help center or contact support before event day.
public_blog.post_fallback_description: AuctionBall blog article for auction organizers.

contact_page.seo_description: Contact AuctionBall for setup help, billing support, and live tournament auction questions.
contact_page.heading: Let us help with your auction
contact_page.subtitle: Send your setup, billing, or event-day question. Include your organization name or tournament date when useful.
contact_page.name: Name
contact_page.message_placeholder: Tell us what you need help with...
contact_page.captcha_help: Answer this quick math question before sending.

error_page.403_body: This page is private or your account does not have permission to open it.
error_page.500_body: The server hit a problem while loading this page. Try again in a moment.
error_page.503_body: AuctionBall is temporarily unavailable while maintenance or deployment finishes.
error_page.404_body: The page may have moved, the link may be old, or the auction resource may no longer be available.

public_page.practice_body: AuctionBall is built for real event-day pressure: fast setup, clear roles, reliable live updates, and enough structure that organizers can recover quickly when a room gets busy.

whatsapp_chat.label: Chat on WhatsApp
whatsapp_chat.title: Chat with AuctionBall on WhatsApp
whatsapp_chat.message: Hi, I need help with AuctionBall.
